items.title: Amerika opet napala Iran, Iran uzvratio napadom na američku bazu
items.summary: AMERIČKA vojska izvela je nove napade na Iran, koji je uzvratio gađajući američku bazu.

items.title: Man arrested after three injured in stabbing at Swiss train station
items.summary: The suspect, a 31-year-old Swiss man, has been arrested, police say, as areas around the station are cordoned off.

items.title: Israel kills children in strikes on Gaza as fear taints Eid joy
items.summary: As Muslims around the world celebrate Eid, Palestinians in Gaza are facing fear, grief, and deadly attacks.

items.title: Ireland football coach urges players to ‘win this war’ against Israel
items.summary: Ireland are set to play Israel in home and away Nations League matches, but there has been pressure to boycott games.

items.title: Europa sanja zajedničku vojsku, a bez svađe ne može napraviti ni zajednički avion
items.summary: EUROPLJANI imaju velike planove za zajedničke oružane sustave. Ali ne mogu se dogovoriti.

items.title: EU kaznila Temu s 200 milijuna eura
items.summary: EUROPSKA komisija je odlučila na temelju Akta o digitalnim uslugama kazniti kinesku internetsku trgovinu Temu s 200 milijuna eura jer "nije učinila dovoljno da spriječi prodaju nelegalnih proizvoda".

items.title: Trump zaprijetio da će "raznijeti Oman". Iran: To je opasan znak
items.summary: IRANSKO ministarstvo vanjskih poslova osudilo je američke napade na jugu zemlje tijekom noći, optužujući Washington za potkopavanje primirja.

items.title: Argentina’s ‘El Loco’ faces Uruguay mutiny ahead of World Cup
items.summary: Marcelo Bielsa's demanding coaching style faces internal threat in Uruguay camp ahead of World Cup as results slide.

items.title: US justice department launches criminal investigation into Trump accuser E Jean Carroll, reports say
items.summary: The case centres on whether the former columnist lied about the funding she received for her civil lawsuit against the US president.

items.title: Sumnja na ebolu u Austriji: Pacijentica u izolaciji, čeka se drugi test
items.summary: U GORNJOJ Austriji hospitalizirana je žena zbog sumnje na ebolu.

items.title: Najmanje četiri osobe izbodene u napadu u Švicarskoj. Svjedoci: Vikao je Allahu Akbar
items.summary: NAJMANJE četiri osobe ozlijeđene su u napadu nožem na željezničkom kolodvoru u gradu Winterthuru, nedaleko od Züricha u Švicarskoj, izvijestili su lokalni mediji.

items.title: Iran says it targeted American base after fresh US strikes
items.summary: The hostilities come during a fragile ceasefire between the US and Iran, and protracted negotiations to end the three-month war.

items.title: Sixteen pupils killed in Kenya school fire
items.summary: Dozens of people were also injured in the fire, the cause of which is not yet known.

items.title: Iran says it has a new air defence system. How significant is it?
items.summary: Iran’s claimed drone interception has renewed attention on Tehran’s military capabilities after months of bombardment.

items.title: At least 16 students killed in fire at Kenya girls school dorm
items.summary: Education minister says 16 killed, 79 injured at Utumishi Girls School in Gilgil, central Kenya.

items.title: Germany’s Voeller urges players to avoid political statements at World Cup
items.summary: German players urged not to repeat protests in 2026 following mouth covering in pre-match photos at Qatar World Cup.

items.title: Children with Down syndrome struggle with devastation of war in Gaza
items.summary: Children with Down syndrome struggle with devastation of war in Gaza

items.title: Njemačka u problemima s plinom. Skladišta se pune sporije od očekivanog
items.summary: NJEMAČKA skladišta plina ne pune se dovoljno brzo, upozorila je državna energetska kompanija Uniper, istaknuvši da su nužni poticaji kako bi se tijekom iduće zime izbjegla nestašica.

items.title: Zelenski ide u Švedsku, razgovarat će o Gripenima za Ukrajinu
items.summary: UKRAJINSKI predsjednik Zelenski u Švedskoj pregovara o nabavi Gripena, uključujući donaciju postojećih borbenih zrakoplova Ukrajini.

items.title: Američka vojska napala brod krijumčara droge, dvoje ubijenih
items.summary: AMERIČKA vojska (SOUTHCOM) izvela je napad na brod za krijumčarenje droge u istočnom Pacifiku. U akciji su ubijene dvije osobe, opisane kao narkoteroristi. Nitko od američkih vojnika nije ozlijeđen.
